mapper.sql: emp_plan_id, flow_desc, gap_thrshld_5pct, snd_src_use_desc, risk_anlys, sig_chg_aprv_proc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM emp.tn_emp_data_ctrl WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_data_ctrl (emp_plan_id, flow_desc, gap_thrshld_5pct, snd_src_use_desc, risk_anlys, sig_chg_aprv_proc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{empPlanId}, #{flowDesc}, COALESCE(#{gapThrshld5pct}, 'Y'), #{sndSrcUseDesc}, #{riskAnlys}, #{sigChgAprvProc}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE emp.tn_emp_data_ctrl SET flow_desc = #{flowDesc}, gap_thrshld_5pct = #{gapThrshld5pct}, snd_src_use_desc = #{sndSrcUseDesc}, risk_anlys = #{riskAnlys}, sig_chg_aprv_proc = #{sigChgAprvProc}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_data_ctrl (emp_plan_id, flow_desc, gap_thrshld_5pct, snd_src_use_desc, risk_anlys, sig_chg_aprv_proc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstEmpPlanId}, flow_desc, gap_thrshld_5pct, snd_src_use_desc, risk_anlys, sig_chg_aprv_proc, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM emp.tn_emp_data_ctrl WHERE emp_plan_id = #{srcEmpPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
